note: AI art generation deferred — requires FLUX 2 Pro / Imagen 4 API keys. This manifest documents what will be generated. Run ai-art-generation node with AI tools configured to produce actual assets.

generation_priority.description: Core tile set (20 base tiles × 4 states) + 4 special tiles
generation_priority.style_prompt_base: Animal Crossing style, rounded soft shapes, pastel warm colors, Japanese island theme, white background, 128x128 pixel icon, clean edges
Japanese island landscape, Animal Crossing aesthetic, soft pastel colors, warm sunlight, 1080x1920 portrait, healing atmosphere

Mobile game UI icon, flat design, warm pastel Japanese theme, clean vector-style

generation_priority.description: VFX sprite sequences and remaining assets
generation_priority.style_prompt_base: Game VFX particle effects, sparkle and glow, warm pastel colors, Japanese aesthetic
